tree.name: Kyle Kuzma
tree.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: MIL traded Khris Middleton, A.J. Johnson, 2028 1st round pick and cash to WAS; Hugo Besson, Delon Wright and cash to NYK; cash to SAS. MIL received Kyle Kuzma, 2025 2nd round pick and 2026 2nd round pick from WAS; Jericho Sims from NYK; trade exceptions.

assetsGivenUp.name: Khris Middleton
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Bucks traded Brandon Jennings to Detroit Pistons for Brandon Knight, Viacheslav Kravtsov and Khris Middleton

assetsGivenUp.name: Brandon Jennings

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Milwaukee's own 2028 1st round pick (WAS has swap option with least favorable of POR/MIL picks)

assetsGivenUp.name: Hugo Besson

assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as free agent by Milwaukee Bucks
